arabicText: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
translationText: The Hour has drawn near, and the moon has split.

arabicText: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةًۭ يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌۭ مُّسْتَمِرٌّۭ
translationText: Yet whenever they see a miracle, they turn away, and say, "Continuous magic."

arabicText: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍۢ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
translationText: They lied, and followed their opinions, but everything has its time.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
translationText: And there came to them news containing a deterrent.

arabicText: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَٰلِغَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
translationText: Profound wisdom-but warnings are of no avail.

arabicText: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ نُّكُرٍ
translationText: So turn away from them. On the Day when the Caller calls to something terrible.

arabicText: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌۭ مُّنتَشِرٌۭ
translationText: Their eyes humiliated, they will emerge from the graves, as if they were swarming locusts.

arabicText: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌۭ
translationText: Scrambling towards the Caller, the disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

arabicText: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌۭ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
translationText: Before them the people of Noah disbelieved. They rejected Our servant, and said, "Crazy," and he was rebuked.

arabicText: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌۭ فَٱنتَصِرْ
translationText: So he appealed to his Lord, "I am overwhelmed, so help me."

arabicText: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍۢ مُّنْهَمِرٍۢ
translationText: So We opened the floodgates of heaven with water pouring down.

arabicText: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًۭا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍۢ قَدْ قُدِرَ
translationText: And We made the earth burst with springs, and the waters met for a purpose already destined.

arabicText: وَحَمَلْنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍۢ وَدُسُرٍۢ
translationText: And We carried him on a craft of planks and nails.

arabicText: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءًۭ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
translationText: Sailing before Our eyes; a reward for him who was rejected.

arabicText: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَٰهَآ ءَايَةًۭ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
translationText: And We left it as a sign. Is there anyone who would take heed?

arabicText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
translationText: So how were My punishment and My warnings?

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
translationText: We made the Quran easy to learn. Is there anyone who would learn?

arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌۭ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
translationText: Aad denied the truth. So how were My punishment and My warnings?

arabicText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا صَرْصَرًۭا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍۢ مُّسْتَمِرٍّۢ
translationText: We unleashed upon them a screaming wind, on a day of unrelenting misery.

arabicText: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍۢ مُّنقَعِرٍۢ
translationText: Plucking the people away, as though they were trunks of uprooted palm-trees.

arabicText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
translationText: So how were My punishment and My warnings?

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
translationText: We made the Quran easy to remember. Is there anyone who would remember?

arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
translationText: Thamood rejected the warnings.

arabicText: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًۭا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًۭا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍ
translationText: They said, "Are we to follow one of us, a human being? We would then go astray, and end up in Hell.

arabicText: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌۭ
translationText: Was the message given to him, out of all of us? In fact, he is a wicked liar."

arabicText: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًۭا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
translationText: They will know tomorrow who the wicked liar is.

arabicText: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةًۭ لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
translationText: We are sending the she-camel as a test for them; so watch them and be patient.

arabicText: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍۢ مُّحْتَضَرٌۭ
translationText: And inform them that the water is to be shared between them; each share of drink made available.

arabicText: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
translationText: But they called their friend, and he dared, and he slaughtered.

arabicText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
translationText: So how were My punishment and My warnings?

arabicText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
translationText: We sent against them a single Scream, and they became like crushed hay.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
translationText: We made the Quran easy to understand. Is there anyone who would understand?

arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
translationText: The people of Lot rejected the warnings.

arabicText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍۢ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَٰهُم بِسَحَرٍۢ
translationText: We unleashed upon them a shower of stones, except for the family of Lot; We rescued them at dawn.

arabicText: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
translationText: A blessing from Us. Thus We reward the thankful.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
translationText: He had warned them of Our onslaught, but they dismissed the warnings.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
translationText: They even lusted for his guest, so We obliterated their eyes. "So taste My punishment and My warnings."

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌۭ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
translationText: Early morning brought upon them enduring punishment.

arabicText: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
translationText: So taste My punishment and My warnings.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
translationText: We made the Quran easy to memorize. Is there anyone who would memorize?

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
translationText: The warnings also came to the people of Pharaoh.

arabicText: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
translationText: They rejected Our signs, all of them, so We seized them-the seizure of an Almighty Omnipotent.

arabicText: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌۭ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
translationText: Are your unbelievers better than all those? Or do you have immunity in the scriptures?

arabicText: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌۭ مُّنتَصِرٌۭ
translationText: Or do they say, "We are united, and we will be victorious"?

arabicText: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
translationText: The multitude will be defeated, and they will turn their backs.

arabicText: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
translationText: The Hour is their appointed time-the Hour is more disastrous, and most bitter.

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍۢ
translationText: The wicked are in confusion and madness.

arabicText: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
translationText: The Day when they are dragged upon their faces into the Fire: "Taste the touch of Saqar."

arabicText: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَٰهُ بِقَدَرٍۢ
translationText: Everything We created is precisely measured.

arabicText: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌۭ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
translationText: And Our command is but once, like the twinkling of an eye.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
translationText: We have destroyed your likes. Is there anyone who would ponder?

arabicText: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍۢ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
translationText: Everything they have done is in the Books.

arabicText: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍۢ وَكَبِيرٍۢ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
translationText: Everything, small or large, is written down.

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَنَهَرٍۢ
translationText: The righteous will be amidst gardens and rivers.

arabicText: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
translationText: In an assembly of virtue, in the presence of an Omnipotent King.
